items.briefing:
Spear phishing — where scammers target specific individuals with convincing, personalised emails — is driving significant payment fraud losses in Australia, according to a new warning from PhishByte. AI tools are making these attacks more sophisticated and harder to spot, with cybercriminals now operating like organised businesses. Staff should be especially cautious of any unexpected emails requesting payment changes or financial approvals.

On a positive note, Google is rolling out fake call detection on Android phones, which will help Australians identify scam calls in real time. **Practical tip:** Always verify payment or banking change requests by calling the requester directly using a known, trusted number — never rely solely on contact details provided in the email itself.

featured.title: PhishByte warns spear phishing drives payment fraud losses
featured.quote: Spear phishing is causing significant payment fraud losses at Australian companies.
